prompt: Tap flop right to set in-position depth context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before depth action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_right is the board anchor because the full flop texture has to be set before in-position pressure is credible.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The right flop card is the right anchor here because the full flop texture has to be set before you judge whether in-position pressure is supported.
